creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Here is new update of radare2 to 2.1. Upstream accepted last patches and now there is no need for "files".

It works for me (freebsd-current). 

Also I'll be happy to maintain this port as previous patches had maintainer timeouts: 
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222931
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=221347
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=213278
